headline: SBA Communications Stock Jumps on Report of Sale Talks
summary: SBA Communications is reportedly considering a possible sale after receiving takeover interest. The stock is taking off.

headline: Discover which S&P500 stocks are making waves on Thursday.
summary: Let's have a look at what is happening on the US markets one hour before the close of the markets on Thursday. Below you can find the top S&P500 gainers and losers in today's session.
